titleStmt.title: SII 18.98: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 98. (B.K. No. 152 of 1932-33.) MALLŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva is dated in a year (damaged) of the Chālukya-Vikrama era, Prajāpati, Pushya ba. 7, Thursday’ Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. During the reign of Vikramāditya VI, in the year Prajāpati the details cited do not work out correctly. In the next year, i.e., Āṅgirasa, however the details correspond to A.D. 1092, December 23, Thursday.

It records that, when Mahāpradhāna, Daṇḍanāyaka Ācharasa and his brother-inlaw Pontarasa were governing Banavāse Twelve-thousand and Bāsavura Hundred-and-forty respectively, the eight gāvuṇḍas and aṟuvattokkalu of Mallavura made a grant of land for offerings to gods Kōṭēśvaradēva. The gift was entrusted to Mallikārjuna-Paṇḍita.

The record also contains two more grants, apparently later additions. The first of these was made to gods Kōṭēs11vara and Kalidēva of Mūlasthāna. The second one was made to god Kalidēva by the eight gāvuṇḍas and others of Mallavura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga cāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha staṁ bhāya saṁbhavē [.]
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ parama bhaṭṭā
rakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijeyarā
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salutta jayantī
purada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā yyuttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi
calada bhujabalada kalitanadolave dīpanoḷu male ba neṁba vairi
ge tale pattippattu tōḷge citatyudghana ripu
bhūpāḷajāḷādavāgnista maḷaghanayaśaḥśrī
manōraṁjanaṁ sadvi garbbhadvikaṁpanavanavakāvyā
rṇnavēṁduprabhāvaṁ paṁkēruha varamadhu
paṁ poṁtirāja pra śrīmanmahapradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ
[Ā]carasaru banavāse pannircchāsi ḷuttamiralavara maydunaṁ śrī matpo
ntarasaru bāsavura nūṟanālvattumanāḷutamiralu malavurada yeṁṭṭu gāvuṁṇḍugaḷu
Aṟuvattokkalumiṟdu kōṭēśvaradēvara nivēdyakke baṭṭimagaṭṭadoḷage biṭṭa gardde kamma
[10 pa ḍuvalu beddalu mattaru 1 tōṭa mara 200 mane ḷa . vūriṁ poṟagaṇa dēvargge
ḍuvalu berddalu mattaru mēṭigoḷaga svasti śrīmaccāḷukya vikramavariśada
prajāpatisaṁvatsarada puṣya ba 7 brihavāra muttarāyaṇasaṁkrā
du mallikārjjunapaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa dharmmami
tipāḷisidavargge gaṁge yamune gurukṣētra vāraṇāsi prayāgeya largghya
da yira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnadalu kaṭṭesi caturvvēdapā
ragarappa brāhmaṇa(ri)rgge vubhayamukhiyāgi koṭṭa phalamakku . yī dharmmama
naḷidavarumā kavileymanā brāhmaṇaruma(ṁ)nā tīrttadalu konda mahāpātakanaku .
svadataṁ paradataṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁndara saṣṭirvvariṣasahaśraṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . śrī mulastāna kalidēvāsvāmige biṭṭa Eleya kēṟiṁ
ge vīsa 1 kōṭēśvaradēvargge Elavara keṟeya keḷage gadde kamma 31 .
© svasti śrīmatu mallavura Eṁṭugāvuṁḍugaḷu śrī kalidēvari(r)ge kesa
vina koṁḍadoḷage gadde kamma 10 kōḍiya sōmanāthadēva(ri)rgge dēguladiṁ
teṁka gaṁgana gaḷeyali 50 keṟeyiṁ muḍalu Ereyoḷāge
reya koḷana muttada koḷana Eraḍu gaḍiya koḷaniṁ paḍuvālu kali
dēva(ri)rgge gaṁgana gaḷeyali matta 1 kaṁmma 20 Uriṁ paḍuvalu banada keṟeyo
ḷage keṁgāḍu gaṁgana gaḷeyalu kalidēva(ri)rgge kamma 50 kalidēvarige gā
ṇake sollage Eṁṇne Eṁṭu gavuḍu Āṟuvattokkalu kalidēva(ri)rgge dēvago
ḷaga vokuḷa śrīmatu bicchagēriya kēta ciddaTen letters after this are erased.
gāvuḍa śrīkalidēvarge bicchageṟeya keḷage darāpūrvvakadiṁ biṭṭa
gade kaṁbha ma 10 . śrīmatu mallagāvuṇḍagēriya ciddagāvuḍana
gayyulagāvuṁḍa śrīkalidēvargge mallagāvuṇḍageṟeya paḍuva gōṭiya keḷage dharā pū
rvvakadiṁ biṭṭa keṁgāḍu kaṁbha 10 nāṁtikapuṣṭikada nōṁpegaḷu mulastanadēvargge naḍe
vudu . svadataṁ paradataṁ vā yō hariti vasuṁdari saṣṭirvvarusaśahaśraṇi Iṣṭayaṁ jā
yatē krimi .
© śrīmatu kalidēvargge malavura kētagavuḍa dēvalōkkakke hōha gavuḍa
[haccakkaṁ ?] maḍi biṭa kētagavuḍageṟeya keḷage gade kaṁba ma 10 .
dati hēṟiṁge ṁ .
Digital edition of SII 18.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
